title: Utsunomiya, Tochigi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Utsunomiya, Tochigi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Utsunomiya is a city in Tochigi with a population of 519,000. Famous for its gyoza dumplings, this northern Kanto city offers affordable living and access to Nikko’s World Heritage sites.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
